facts: July 4 is Independence Day because on that day the United States became free from being ruled by another country.
Democracy means that people vote to choose their leaders, so everyone gets a say in who makes decisions.
Slavery was a time when some people were not free and were treated as property; now all people in our country are free and equal.
misconceptions: A child might think that democracy means everyone gets to vote on every single rule or decision, but actually in a democracy people vote for leaders who then make decisions.
